sentences.text: Please enter the first few letters of the name of the person you would like to speak to.

Thank you for calling the twenty one Alpha group group offices our office hours are Monday through Friday eight AM to four thirty PM Pacific standard time. If you know your party's extension you may press the pound sign, followed by the three, digit extension at any time, otherwise please select from the following options to access the staff directory please press one to learn about applying to a section eight apartment and Los Angeles, please press nine to leave a message on any other topic, please press pound one zero zero to make an after hours emergency maintenance request in Los Angeles, please hang up and dial area code three, two three eight one three four eight. The selection is invalid please reenter. Thank you for calling the twenty one Alpha group group offices our office hours are Monday through Friday eight AM to four thirty PM Pacific standard time.
